raw_problem: Prove the chain rule and use it to prove that d/dx sin(x^2) = 2*x*cos(x^2).

problem_json.raw_problem: Prove the chain rule and use it to prove that d/dx sin(x^2) = 2*x*cos(x^2)

obligations.description: Show the chain rule holds for f(g(x)) = sin(x^2)
Show the derivative of sin(x) is cos(x)
Show the derivative of x^2 is 2x

acceptance_rubric: Must use derivative rules for sin and cos
